name: Spring Ghosts
description: A secretive and exiled sub-culture of the River Folk, living in a network of warm, mineral-rich caves.
goals: Defend their hidden territory and way of life
Maintain secrecy and concealment from the surface world
methods: Passive defense through calculated, non-lethal doctrine of haunting and misdirection
resources: Warm, mineral-rich caves and underground networks
Biomancy or Illusion magic for temporary disguise
weaknesses: Vulnerability to data-driven intelligence and analysis
Limited resources and isolation from the surface world
